scenario.name: RFC7329 alice register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: alice <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: alice <sip:alice@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Session-ID: 13579bdf2468ace013579bdf2468ace0 Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: alice <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: alice <sip:alice@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Session-ID: 13579bdf2468ace013579bdf2468ace0 Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 300 [authentication username=alice password=alicepass] Content-Length: 0
